code:
def min_cost_to_cut_board(horizontal_costs, vertical_costs):
    horizontal_costs.sort(reverse=True)
    vertical_costs.sort(reverse=True)

    total_cost = 0
    
    horizontal_segments = 1
    vertical_segments = 1

    h_ptr = 0
    v_ptr = 0

    while h_ptr < len(horizontal_costs) or v_ptr < len(vertical_costs):
        if h_ptr < len(horizontal_costs) and \
           (v_ptr >= len(vertical_costs) or horizontal_costs[h_ptr] >= vertical_costs[v_ptr]):
            total_cost += horizontal_costs[h_ptr] * vertical_segments
            horizontal_segments += 1
            h_ptr += 1
        else:
            total_cost += vertical_costs[v_ptr] * horizontal_segments
            vertical_segments += 1
            v_ptr += 1

    return total_cost
prompt: Minimum cost to cut a board into squares yaz.
